title: Senior Software Engineer - Medlife - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Medlife - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Medlife invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Medlife:
Medlife is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife!
